title: From Neural Machine Translation to LLM-Augmented Translation Workflows: A Scoping Survey
description: Search, screening, extraction, metadata-cleanup, and evidence-mapping documentation for a scoping survey of neural machine translation, Transformer-based machine translation, large language models, and LLM-augmented translation workflows.

creators.name: Wang, Xiongfei
creators.affiliation: Faculty of English Language and Culture, Guangdong University of Foreign Studies, Guangzhou, China
